assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Phase 1: Control plane upgrade' first, then 'Phase 2: Node Pool Upgrades' with explicit gcloud command for master upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Response provides explicit order 'Coordinators → Data → Masters (least to most critical)' with detailed rationale for each step

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Regional PD-SSD - Storage survives node replacement automatically' in key safety measures section

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Response provides complete PDB configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for masters and explicit comment 'Allow 1 master to drain, keep quorum of 2'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Response includes explicit gcloud commands setting '--max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0' for all node pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes health checks after each node pool upgrade, including 'curl -X GET localhost:9200/_cluster/health' commands and 'wait_for_status=green'

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Response includes specific kubectl command to 'Verify PV reclaim policy is Retain' in pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Response includes 'watch kubectl get nodes' and 'kubectl get pods' commands to monitor upgrade progress throughout the process

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Response includes specific curl command for taking Elasticsearch snapshot using '_snapshot' API in pre-upgrade checklist
